lint.command: echo "ESLint not configured yet — lint is a no-op until ci-enhancement feature adds it"

blockingIssues.description: README.md overclaims the live PVM proof by presenting roundtrip settlement as proven even though the retained raw probe artifact marks stage2 and stage3 as failed, so judge-facing documentation is not aligned with the canonical evidence set.
docs/dualvm/dualvm_vm_interop_proof.md still states Stage 2 callback passed and presents Stage 3 as passed, which contradicts dualvm/deployments/polkadot-hub-testnet-probe-results.json.

Retained judge-facing docs under docs/dualvm still reference superseded multisig/versioned/quote-ticket artifacts and deleted manifest paths, including dualvm_governed_root_proof.md, dualvm_versioned_market_proof.md, dualvm_quote_ticket_cutover_proof.md, and submission_evidence/wording_audit.md.

appliedUpdates.description: Added .factory/library/pvm-probe-verdicts.md documenting the current raw probe stage statuses and the contradiction inside polkadot-hub-testnet-probe-results.json so future docs work does not overclaim callback/roundtrip proof success.
Updated .factory/library/environment.md to record that this machine's /tmp tmpfs is full and validator runs that create temporary files should use TMPDIR=/var/tmp.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require doc-rewrite workers to audit every retained proof artifact and submission-evidence file for contradictions, superseded manifests, and dead references after deciding which docs to keep.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The nuclear-doc-rewrite review found stale multisig and old-manifest references left in retained judge-facing docs such as dualvm_governed_root_proof.md, dualvm_versioned_market_proof.md, dualvm_quote_ticket_cutover_proof.md, and docs/dualvm/submission_evidence/wording_audit.md.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: For line-reduction features, instruct workers to use git diff stats as the authoritative net reduction measurement instead of before/after wc -l snapshots.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The code-reduction review noted the skill still recommends wc -l accounting even though the accepted reduction evidence for this repo came from git diff stats over the changed scope.

rejectedObservations.observation: Shared state says npx tsc --noEmit is already failing due to pre-existing viem declaration gaps and implicit-any errors.
rejectedObservations.reason: stale: the current scrutiny validator run completed npx tsc --noEmit successfully with exit code 0.

rejectedObservations.observation: The Hardhat path was not discovering .tsx tests, which caused dead frontend smoke tests to accumulate.
rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous: the review cited historical evidence, but this validator run did not independently reproduce the test-discovery behavior from current state.
